section.heading: Big Hole National Battlefield; redesignation of monument

content.p: The Big Hole Battlefield National Monument, established by Executive Order Numbered 1216 of June 23, 1910, and enlarged by Proclamation Numbered 2339 of June 29, 1939, is hereby redesignated as the Big Hole National Battlefield.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: Executive Order Numbered 1216 of June 23, 1910, referred to in text, is not classified to the Code.
Proclamation Numbered 2339 of June 29, 1939 (53 Stat. 2544), referred to in text, is not classified to the Code.
